questions.question: What are the three main types of metadata interfaces in JDBC and what does each provide?
expectedPoints: ResultSetMetaData - provides column information for ResultSet
ParameterMetaData - provides parameter information for PreparedStatement

questions.question: Explain the importance of proper exception handling in JDBC applications and describe the key exception types.
expectedPoints: Prevents application crashes and data corruption
SQLException - base exception for all JDBC errors
Transaction rollback in case of failures
